scripts.tauri:dev: bash -c 'set -e; pnpm tauri:dev:a & A=$!; for i in $(seq 1 400); do curl -sf http://localhost:1420 >/dev/null && break; sleep 0.3; done; curl -sf http://localhost:1420 >/dev/null || { kill $A 2>/dev/null; echo "Timed out waiting for Vite on :1420"; exit 1; }; sleep 1; pnpm tauri:dev:b & B=$!; trap "kill $A $B 2>/dev/null; exit 130" INT TERM; wait $A $B'
scripts.tauri:dev:single: mkdir -p tmp/data && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data" pnpm tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev:a: mkdir -p tmp/data && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_ENABLE_NETWORK=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data" pnpm tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev:b: mkdir -p tmp/data-b && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_ENABLE_NETWORK=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data-b" pnpm tauri dev --no-dev-server-wait -c src-tauri/tauri.dev-instance-b.conf.json
scripts.tauri:dev:c: mkdir -p tmp/data-c && CO_NO_KEYCHAIN=true CO_ENABLE_NETWORK=true CO_BASE_PATH="$PWD/tmp/data-c" pnpm tauri dev --no-dev-server-wait -c src-tauri/tauri.dev-instance-c.conf.json
scripts.clear:data: rm -rf tmp/data tmp/data-b tmp/data-c && echo "Cleared local CO data (tmp/data*). Restart with pnpm tauri:dev."
